title: Cuter Villager Noises
body:
🧺 Cuter Villager Noises – Resource Pack
Give your Minecraft villages an adorable audio makeover with Cuter Villager Noises! This resource pack swaps out the default grumbly Villager sounds for soft, sweet, and playful alternatives—perfect for cozy builds, wholesome gameplay, or just making your world feel a bit more lovable.

🎵 Features:

Replaces all standard Villager sounds with cute, CC0-licensed audio from Freesound.org

Preserves each Villager’s unique personality—just with a much softer tone

Fully compatible with singleplayer and multiplayer worlds

Perfect when paired with mods or packs that give Villagers cuter models (like plush, chibi, or stylized designs)

💗 Made for Minecraft Java Edition 1.20+
🎧 Tip: Headphones recommended for maximum aww!
